creator: trevor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thank you, Erich.  I committed this with some changes: 

- whitespace fixes to Makefile, mostly suggested by "portlint -acNt" 
- added $FreeBSD$ to Makefile (also suggested by portlint) 
- stylistic changes to pkg-comment (one suggested by portlint) 
- patch wouldn't apply--while redoing it, I renamed it too 
- put mention of Ogg Vorbis format into pkg-descr
